stable_visual_summary: A powerful, one-eyed humanoid entity of human scale. While her specific attire is not defined, she utilizes invisible magic for her presence. Her physical form is highly unstable when exposed to water, at which point she loses all structural integrity and melts into a shapeless mass.
state_variants: Melted (shapeless mass upon contact with water)
continuity_constraints: Must maintain a single eye as a primary identifier.
Transformation into a shapeless mass is triggered specifically by contact with water.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific age and physical build details are not provided.
Visual appearance of clothing/armor is unknown due to reliance on invisible magic.

origin_or_historical_context: Inhabitants of the Country of the Winkies; subjects to the Wicked Witch of the West.
stable_visual_summary: The Winkies are a group of humanoid, bipedal beings of human scale. They are visually defined by their consistent use of yellow clothing and serve as the enslaved population within the territory of the Wicked Witch of the West.
role: Humanoid slaves to the Wicked Witch of the West.
relationship_notes: Subservient/enslaved to the Wicked Witch of the West.
Interacted with Dorothy, the Tin Woodman, Scarecrow, and Cowardly Lion.
continuity_constraints: Maintain consistent yellow clothing across group members.
Must be rendered as a humanoid bipedal group.
unresolved_ambiguities: Exact age range of the population is unknown.
